subtopics.title: Components
subtopics.content:
- **104 numbered cards** (1-104)
- Each card has 1-7 bull heads (penalty points):
  - Cards ending in 5: 2 bulls
  - Cards ending in 0: 3 bulls
  - Doubles (11, 22, 33...): 5 bulls
  - Card 55: 7 bulls
  - All others: 1 bull

subtopics.title: Table Setup
subtopics.content:
1. **Shuffle all 104 cards.**
2. **Deal 10 cards** to each player.
3. **Place 4 cards** face up in a column — these start 4 rows.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
- **10 cards in hand** — Keep hidden.
- **All players play simultaneously** each round.

subtopics.title: Game Overview
subtopics.content: 6 Nimmt! is a simultaneous card game. Play cards onto 4 rows. If your card becomes the 6th in a row, you take that row's bull head penalties. Lowest penalty total wins.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
All players act simultaneously:
1. **Choose** — Everyone secretly selects 1 card from their hand.
2. **Reveal** — All selected cards are flipped face up at the same time.
3. **Place cards** — Starting with the lowest number, each card is placed according to placement rules.
4. **Repeat** for 10 rounds until all cards are played.

subtopics.title: Key Actions
subtopics.content:
#### Card Placement Rules
- Each card must go on the row whose current last card is the closest lower number.
- Example: If rows end in 12, 37, 55, 80 and you play 42, it goes on the 37 row.

#### 6th Card Rule
- If your card would be the 6th card in a row, you take all 5 existing cards as penalty.
- Your card then becomes the new start of that row.

#### Lowest Card Rule
- If your card is lower than all 4 row-ending cards, you must choose a row to take.
- Take all cards from your chosen row as penalty.
- Your card starts a new row.

#### Bull Heads (Penalty Points)
- 1 bull: most cards
- 2 bulls: cards ending in 5 (5, 15, 25...)
- 3 bulls: cards ending in 0 (10, 20, 30...)
- 5 bulls: double numbers (11, 22, 33...)
- 7 bulls: card 55

subtopics.title: Special Rules
subtopics.content:
- **Simultaneous play** — No turn order for selection; all choose at once.
- **Resolution order** — Cards are resolved lowest to highest.
- **Multi-round game** — Play multiple hands. Shuffle and redeal each hand.
- **66 points elimination** (variant) — Player reaching 66 bulls is eliminated.

subtopics.title: Scoring and Endgame
subtopics.content:
#### Hand End
- After 10 rounds, count bull heads collected.

#### Game End
- Play multiple hands. Player who reaches 66 bull heads triggers game end.
- **Lowest total bull heads wins.**

subtopics.title: Beginner Tips
subtopics.content:
- **Play middle cards early** — Very low and very high cards are safest to hold.
- **Count row lengths** — Watch which rows are close to 5 cards.
- **Avoid 5th position** — If a row has 4 cards, playing there risks triggering the 6th card.
- **Low cards are dangerous** — If all rows are high, a low card forces you to take a row.

subtopics.title: Key Strategies
subtopics.content:
- **Gap reading** — Play cards that leave large gaps to reduce chances of other cards landing on your row.
- **Row control** — Try to play 5th card on a row with few bulls, so the 6th card penalty goes to someone else.
- **Sacrifice rows** — If forced to take, choose the row with fewest bull heads.
- **Card counting** — With more players, track which numbers have been played.
